headline: United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS) Is A Top Stock In Miller Value Partners’ Filings
summary: We recently published Bill Miller Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks. United Parcel Service, Inc. (NYSE:UPS) is one of the top stock picks. Postal giant United Parcel Service, Inc.
